code:
import io
import string

let line = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

mut prev = 0
mut has_prev = false
mut sorted = true
mut current = ""
mut i = 0
let n = string.len(line)

while i <= n
  mut is_ws = false
  if i == n
    is_ws = true
  else
    match string.byte_at(line, i)
    when Some(b)
      if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
        is_ws = true
      end
    when None
      is_ws = true
    end
  end

  if is_ws
    if not string.is_empty(current)
      match string.parse_int(current)
      when Some(v)
        if has_prev
          if v < prev
            sorted = false
          end
        end
        prev = v
        has_prev = true
      when None
        ()
      end
      current = ""
    end
  else
    match string.byte_at(line, i)
    when Some(b)
      current = "#{current}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
    when None
      ()
    end
  end

  i = i + 1
end

if sorted
  println("YES")
else
  println("NO")
end
